title: What will you learn in this topic

content.problemStatement:
The next topic in our journey is String & Character arrays  where you will learn the following concepts.

- Substring Extraction Using Loops in C
- Finding Character strchr() in C
- Finding Substring strstr() in C
- Splitting string
- String Copying strncpy() in C
- String Clearing memset() in C
- Case conversion - toupper(), tolower()
- atoi() and atof() Conversions in C
- sprintf() to Convert Number to String in C
